title: eupatoriophalacron album
intro: Eupatoriophalacron album, also known as the white snakeroot, is a plant species belonging to the family Eupatoriaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and snakebites. The health benefits of Eupatoriophalacron album include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction for use in herbal remedies, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity.
